programme.desc: Bella delivers baby Wes via C-section while Hunter hopes his dad will come to meet his grandson. Mia's graduation is overshadowed by her mom's behavior. Amya faces mounting pressure as postpartum and weight gain struggles begin to take a toll.

programme.desc: Mia's 39-week checkup sparks a fight between AK and Nicole, leading to an early induction. Bella and Wes are cleared to go home as Hunter struggles with basic dad duties. Isabella and Bryce head to therapy, though Tasha doubts it will fix anything.

programme.title: 1000-lb Roomies
